title: Chemical Technician - SEMICON MNC
description:
Our client is a global leader in silicon wafer manufacturing, supplying top-tier semiconductor companies worldwide. They have a wide range of clients worldwide because their wafers are using in all devices like mobiles, laptop, vehicles and many more and that is why they offer job stability compared to smaller or project-based companies. If you can notice that our devices are made of Semicon wafers that are a foundational material, making my client less vulnerable than downstream companies. So, it is Ideal for candidates looking for long-term employment, not frequent job hopping. It's a stable, globally recognized company, and gives you exposure that strengthens your long-term career. If you're looking for consistency, growth, and strong industry value, this is a very solid move.

Job Scope

  • Performing routine chemical analysis and quality control tests to ensure product quality and compliance with industry standards

  • Monitoring and maintaining chemical storage, handling, and disposal systems to adhere to safety and environmental regulations

  • Troubleshooting and resolving issues related to chemical processes, equipment, and systems

  • Collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimise chemical processes and implement process improvements

  • Maintaining detailed records and documentation for all chemical operations and activities

  • Providing technical support and training to production team members as needed

Requirements

  • Min Nitec/Diploma or degree in Chemical, Physics, Material Science Engineering or a related scientific discipline

  • Strong understanding of chemical properties, processes, and safety protocols

  • Proficiency in operating and troubleshooting analytical equipment and instrumentation

  • Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and attention to detail

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team to achieve shared goals

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to effectively liaise with cross-functional stakeholders

Ready to elevate your career? We never charge our candidates. Take the leap and send your resume today to engg1@talenttradersg.com or julie@talenttradersg.com. Let's unlock your potential together!

EA License No: 13C6305

Reg. No.: R1981808/JULIE RODRIGUES LUBRIN

For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.
